allow: Bash(python -c "from alert_db import migrate_schema, _FIELDS; print\(f'alert_db OK — {len\(_FIELDS\)} campos'\)")

Bash(powershell -Command "python -c \\"import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_parquet\('ml_training_base.parquet'\); print\('Columns:', list\(df.columns\)[:30]\); print\('Shape:', df.shape\); fcols = ['consecutive_red_days', 'ma_200d_ratio', 'insider_buy_recent', 'earnings_beat_rate', 'analyst_rating', 'short_interest_pct']; print\('New feature cols:', [\(c, c in df.columns, df[c].dtype if c in df.columns else None\) for c in fcols]\)\\" 2>&1")
Bash(powershell -Command "Select-String -Path '.\\*.py' -Pattern 'async def|await ' | Select-Object FileName, LineNumber, Line | head -30")
